register.note: Full-width with a mono figcaption, but a thin diagonal line bisecting a near-empty box reads as a generic line chart at thumbnail size, where ciechanowski-watch/00's dimensional watch specimen is instantly poster-worthy.

The hero is deliberately stripped to data+line and shows only the fitted result, whereas seeing-theory-regression/01 draws the pink squared-error boxes on every residual so the mechanism itself is the image.

The spine plot self-describes (inline 'y-hat — the model's line' in prediction-blue, a claim title, manipulation hint, live stat table, and gold/blue prose terms bound to the marks), though one label short of distill-momentum/02's five labeled regimes.

Warm cream palette and hairline restraint are calm, but ~180px of dead air below the lede and a single line floating on white leave compositional slack that ciechanowski-watch/02's taut coil+sliders+tinted-prose column does not.

Judged conservatively from stills: a single explanatory load (line eases up once) plus learner-driven live refit and a ballooning penalty square in Run/Break give a steppable, explanatory vocabulary, even if 3b1b's synchronized animation can't be verified from a frame.

Semantic grammar is held with no dilution (truth=gold, prediction=blue, error reserved for pink residuals, param=tinted readouts) and carried into prose via weight+underline so colour is never the sole carrier — exceeding r2d3-trees/00's class-colour use on the prose binding.

hero.note: A full-width, single-load specimen with a mono figcaption, but it depicts only the fitted line (no residuals/squares/bowl) and reads as a generic diagonal in dead air rather than a distinctive, mechanism-bearing poster.

assessment.note: An interactive hands-on LAB TASK (05, gated on MSE<2) exists, but the explicit TRANSFER item (06, the house-prices/mansions case) resolves as a three-option MCQ rather than an open or interactive prompt.

blocking: Hero omits the mechanism: render residual squares/lines or a ghosted loss-bowl on the specimen instead of data+line alone.
Recompose the hero so the fit is not a thin diagonal across a ~50% empty box (zoom/spread or add y-context) so it is legible as a specimen at thumbnail size.
Remove the ~180px dead air between the masthead promise and the spine in the default Story viewport.
Make the TRANSFER item (06) interactive or open rather than a three-option MCQ.
verdict.summary: Strong interactive acts and disciplined colour, but the hero shows the outcome not the mechanism and floats in dead air — two DELIGHT floors miss, so it holds below register 3.
